name: canvas-design
description: Create beautiful visual art in .png and .pdf documents using design philosophy. You should use this skill when the user asks to create a poster, piece of art, design, or other static piece. Create original visual designs, never copying existing artists' work to avoid copyright violations.
capabilities: Generate original visual art designs in PNG and PDF format
Apply design philosophy principles to create cohesive visual compositions
Select and use curated typography from 40+ licensed fonts
Create minimalist, design-forward compositions with proper spacing and layout
Produce multi-page PDF documents with consistent design language
Work with diverse aesthetic movements including Brutalist, Geometric, and Organic styles
author: 7Spade
securitySummary: All 203 static findings are false positives. This is a pure prompt-based skill containing only design instructions and licensed font files. The 'weak cryptographic algorithm', 'C2 keywords', 'system reconnaissance', and 'external commands' detections are triggered by benign text in Open Font License files, Apache license text, and natural language design instructions. No executable code, network operations, or external command execution exists.
valueStatement: Users struggle to create original, museum-quality visual designs that require deep design knowledge and typography expertise. This skill generates sophisticated visual art using curated fonts and design philosophy principles, producing original PNG and PDF outputs.
userTitle: Create Visual Art with Design Philosophy
limitations: Cannot edit or modify existing images or photographs
Cannot access external font libraries beyond included fonts
Cannot create animated or interactive content
Output quality depends on Claude's interpretation of design philosophy

useCases.title: Create original posters
useCases.description: Generate unique poster designs for events, venues, or artistic projects using sophisticated typography

useCases.title: Explore design aesthetics
useCases.description: Develop and visualize new design philosophies and aesthetic movements for design projects

useCases.title: Visual expression
useCases.description: Transform concepts into visual art pieces that communicate through form, color, and composition

promptTemplates.title: Simple poster request
promptTemplates.prompt: Create a poster design for a jazz club. Use sophisticated typography and a dark, moody color palette.

promptTemplates.title: Specific philosophy
promptTemplates.prompt: Create a visual piece expressing Chromatic Language design philosophy. Color should be the primary information system.

promptTemplates.title: Multi-page document
promptTemplates.scenario: Create a coffee table book page
promptTemplates.prompt: Create the first page of a coffee table book about organic gardening. Use the Organic Systems philosophy.

promptTemplates.title: Refined masterpiece
promptTemplates.prompt: The previous design is not perfect enough. Refine it to museum-quality with expert-level craftsmanship.

bestPractices: Provide specific themes or concepts to guide the design philosophy creation
Request refinement iterations for museum-quality results
Specify color preferences and emotional tone for best results
antiPatterns: Asking for exact replication of existing artwork or trademarked designs
Requesting complex animations or interactive elements
Expecting photorealistic imagery or photograph manipulation

faq.question: What file formats does this skill output?
faq.answer: The skill outputs PNG images and PDF documents for visual art, along with Markdown files documenting the design philosophy.

faq.question: How many fonts are available?
faq.answer: Over 40 licensed fonts are included, covering serif, sans-serif, monospace, and display styles from Google and Vercel.

faq.question: Can I use this skill with other Claude tools?
faq.answer: Yes, this skill works with Claude, Codex, and Claude Code. The visual outputs can be used alongside text-based tools.

faq.question: Is my data safe when using this skill?
faq.answer: Yes, this is a prompt-only skill with no network access or external data transmission. All design generation happens locally.

faq.question: Why does the design look different from my request?
faq.answer: The skill interprets requests through design philosophy frameworks, prioritizing artistic interpretation and visual coherence.

faq.question: How is this different from image generation AI?
faq.answer: Unlike pixel-based image generators, this skill creates typography-focused designs with precise control over layout and composition.
